query: SELECT DISTINCT tipoExame FROM examesLaboratoriais WHERE tipoExame LIKE '%sang%' OR tipoExame LIKE '%tipo%' OR tipoExame LIKE '%Rh%' OR tipoExame LIKE '%ABO%' OR tipoExame LIKE '%grupo%' LIMIT 20;
